name: paid-google-vs-facebook
prompt: Should I run Google Ads or Facebook ads for my new ergonomic office chair?
expected_output: Delivers a real recommendation on stated assumptions (deliver-first), framed by demand-capture vs demand-creation, with the search-volume/intent logic — not a wall of questions.
assertions: Gives an actual recommendation on stated assumptions, not only clarifying questions
Frames the choice as search (capture existing demand) vs paid social (create demand / visual discovery)
Reasons about whether people already search for the product, and notes a visual product suits social discovery
States its assumption(s) in a line and invites correction
Mentions judging by CPA/ROAS against economics rather than vanity metrics
